completed.title: Extend automation comment persistence with coordinate-aware patch support
verificationNotes: Extended Workflow automation comments to persist `targetType`, `updatedAt`, `pinnedX`, `pinnedY`, and optional `manualX` / `manualY`, and added PATCH support for updating those fields.
Create requests now require `targetType`, `pinnedX`, and `pinnedY` instead of silently defaulting malformed input.
PATCH now supports clearing `manualX` / `manualY` via explicit `null`, which is needed for later pin reattachment behavior.
Malformed persisted comments missing required pinned coordinates are now dropped instead of being fabricated at `(0,0)`.
